testsuite.name: Alif SDIO WiFi Shell Test Suite
testsuite.details:
WiFi Shell Test Suite for the Alif AIROC CYW55500 SDIO/WiFi driver. Tests WiFi station (STA) scanning, connection, status query, ICMP ping, stress cycling, performance timing, and negative cases.
Target boards: Alif E8 AppKit (ae822fa0e5597xx0/rtss_hp). Preconditions: WiFi AP running with SSID/PSK matching Kconfig defaults.

testcase.name: test_wifi_scan
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-001: Verify WiFi scan discovers at least one AP.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi driver initialized (firmware loaded, interface up). 2. At least one WiFi AP is active within RF range.

step.actions: Call net_mgmt(NET_REQUEST_WIFI_SCAN) with active scan type.
step.expectedresults: Request accepted (returns 0). EAGAIN or -119 retried internally.
Scan completes within WIFI_SHELL_SCAN_TIMEOUT_SEC seconds.
At least one AP found (scan_result_count > 0).

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-001: WiFi scanning must discover available APs

testcase.name: test_wifi_connect
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-002: Verify WiFi connect to configured SSID succeeds.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi interface up and driver ready. 2. Configured AP (WIFI_SHELL_TEST_SSID / WIFI_SHELL_TEST_PSK) is reachable.

step.expectedresults: Request accepted (returns 0). EAGAIN retried internally.
Connect completes within WIFI_SHELL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC seconds with status 0.
Returns WIFI_STATE_COMPLETED.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-002: WiFi connect to configured network must succeed

testcase.name: test_wifi_status
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-003: Verify WiFi status query returns valid connected state.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi is connected (test_wifi_connect or prior state).

step.actions: Call net_mgmt(NET_REQUEST_WIFI_IFACE_STATUS) to populate struct wifi_iface_status.
step.expectedresults: Returns 0 (success).
state == WIFI_STATE_COMPLETED, ssid_len > 0, RSSI is a valid negative dBm value.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-003: WiFi status query must report connected state with valid SSID/RSSI

testcase.name: test_wifi_ping_gateway
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-004: Verify ICMP echo request to default gateway succeeds.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi connected and DHCP acquired (gateway address known).

step.expectedresults: Gateway address is non-zero.

step.actions: Initialize ICMP context (NET_ICMPV4_ECHO_REPLY) with reply handler.
step.expectedresults: net_icmp_init_ctx returns 0.

step.actions: Send echo request to gateway, wait for reply with retry.
step.expectedresults: At least one ICMP reply received within timeout.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-004: ICMP ping to default gateway must succeed

testcase.name: test_wifi_disconnect
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-005: Verify WiFi disconnect from connected AP succeeds.

step.expectedresults: Returns 0.
Disconnect completes within WIFI_SHELL_DISCONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC seconds with status 0.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-005: WiFi disconnect must complete successfully

testcase.name: test_wifi_reconnect
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-006: Verify WiFi reconnect after explicit disconnect succeeds.

step.expectedresults: Request accepted (0), or -EALREADY/-120 if already connected (treated as pass).

step.actions: Wait for connect result with retry.
step.expectedresults: Connect succeeds (status 0) within timeout. State is WIFI_STATE_COMPLETED.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-006: WiFi reconnect must succeed after disconnect

testcase.name: test_stress_repeated_scan
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-007: Stress test – consecutive WiFi scans without reset.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi driver ready. At least one AP in range.

step.actions: Loop WIFI_SHELL_STRESS_SCAN_ITERATIONS times: request scan, wait for done, verify APs found.
step.expectedresults: Every scan completes successfully and finds at least one AP. No firmware crash or hang.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-007: Repeated scan stress must not crash or degrade

testcase.name: test_stress_connect_disconnect
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-008: Stress test – repeated connect/disconnect cycles.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi driver ready. Configured AP reachable.

step.actions: Loop WIFI_SHELL_STRESS_CONN_ITERATIONS times: connect (with retry), verify COMPLETED, disconnect, verify timeout/disconnect event.
step.expectedresults: Every cycle connects and disconnects successfully. Firmware remains functional.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-008: Repeated connect/disconnect stress must not crash

testcase.name: test_perf_scan_timing
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-009: Performance benchmark – measure WiFi scan duration.

step.actions: Run 3 scans, timing each from request to scan-done event.
step.expectedresults: All scans complete successfully. Average scan time printed.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-009: Scan timing benchmark for regression tracking

testcase.name: test_perf_connect_timing
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-010: Performance benchmark – measure WiFi connect duration.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi currently disconnected. 2. Configured AP reachable.

step.actions: Time connect request from send to COMPLETED state.
step.expectedresults: Connect succeeds. Elapsed time printed for regression tracking.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-010: Connect timing benchmark for regression tracking

testcase.name: test_perf_ping_latency
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-011: Performance benchmark – measure ICMP ping latency.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi connected and DHCP acquired with gateway set.

step.actions: Send 5 ICMP echo requests to gateway, timing each round-trip.
step.expectedresults: At least 3/5 pings succeed. Min/avg/max latency printed.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-011: Ping latency benchmark for regression tracking

testcase.name: test_neg_connect_wrong_ssid
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-012: Negative test – connect with non-existent SSID must fail.

step.actions: Attempt connect with SSID "NONEXISTENT_SSID_12345" and dummy PSK.
step.expectedresults: Either request rejected immediately, or connect result event reports non-zero failure status.
State is not WIFI_STATE_COMPLETED.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-012: Connect with wrong SSID must fail gracefully

testcase.name: test_neg_disconnect_not_connected
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-013: Negative test – disconnect when not connected must not crash.

step.expectedresults: Returns 0 or error code. No crash, no hang. System remains functional.
State is not WIFI_STATE_COMPLETED.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-013: Disconnect when not connected must not crash

testcase.name: test_neg_connect_wrong_psk
testcase.summary: REQ-WIFI-014: Negative test – connect with valid SSID but wrong PSK must fail.
testcase.preconditions: 1. WiFi disconnected. 2. NOTE: On some firmware (CYW43439), wrong PSK may cause a firmware trap. This test runs in a separate destructive suite.

step.actions: Attempt connect with correct SSID but PSK "WrongPassword123!".
step.expectedresults: Either request rejected, or connect result reports non-zero failure. State is not COMPLETED.

testcase.requirement: REQ-WIFI-014: Connect with wrong PSK must fail (destructive test)
